summary: Fix verification for HIGH bug from iteration_2 (tabs row horizontal overflow on /leads at 412px in Indonesian). All fix-verification AND regression scenarios pass. Horizontal overflow is gone in both EN and ID; EN labels remain fully visible (not truncated). Tab clicks, URL sync, accordion toggle, move-to-human buttons, bottom nav active color, language switch, and manifest/service-worker all continue to work.
critical_code_review_comments: Leads.jsx TabButton fix (min-w-0 + flex-1 + truncate, gap-1.5, px-2.5; container gap-2+px-5) cleanly eliminates overflow at 412 in both EN and ID. Implementation is idiomatic Tailwind and avoids language-conditional styles.

In ID both tab widths (181px and 183px) now share the row evenly; label 'Tindak Lanjut Manusia' is rendered without visible truncation at 412px thanks to flex-1 + min-w-0 (no ellipsis currently appears — labels fit). If Indonesian wording grows, truncate with ellipsis will gracefully activate.
No other regressions observed from iteration_2; all data-testids still present and behavior unchanged.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (fix verified: ID no-overflow, EN no-overflow + no-truncate, all iteration_2 regression checks pass)

context_for_next_testing_agent: At viewport 412x900: ID /leads has scrollWidth=clientWidth=412, tab-ai.right=392, tab-human width=181, tab-ai width=183. EN /leads has scrollWidth=clientWidth=412, tab-ai.right=392, both labels 'Human Follow-up' and 'AI Follow-up' render without CSS truncation (span.scrollWidth == span.clientWidth). Regression passes: URL syncs to ?tab=ai on click, schedule-ai-accordion toggles schedule-ai-content, move-to-human-{id} buttons present on AI tab, nav-leads color rgb(255,255,255), /manifest.json and /service-worker.js return 200. REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://frontend-forge-25.preview.emergentagent.com.
rca_of_the_issue: Previous RCA (iteration_2): TabButton used whitespace-nowrap + flex-1, so Indonesian labels 'Tindak Lanjut Manusia' (219px) + 'Tindak Lanjut AI' (181px) + gap-3 (12px) + container px-6 (48px) = 460px required > 412px viewport. Fix applied by main agent in /app/frontend/src/pages/Leads.jsx: TabButton now uses `flex min-w-0 flex-1 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-full px-2.5` with label span `min-w-0 truncate` and container `mt-4 flex gap-2 px-5`. Result: each tab is allowed to shrink to fit the allocated flex share; documentElement.scrollWidth=412 in both languages. Verified via Playwright at viewport 412x900 — see metrics in context_for_next_testing_agent.
